type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Carbon monoxide emission estimates come from landfill gas flaring completed in 2009.  Uncontolled emission estimates for CO emissions related to biomass/waste can be calculated, however, flare emission rates (controlled emissions) fluctuate from year to y

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Landfill gas flaring increased in 2009 and emissions for PM2.5 and PM10 were required to be reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increased flaring of landfill gases dictated the reporting of PM2.5 and PM10 as they exceed the threshold limit for reporting to NPRI.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Landfill gas flaring effectively reduced the total VOC gas emission rates of the landfill.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: On-site flare calculations included burning of VOC compounds.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Site is an active non-hazardous landfill site and received waste throughout 2009.  Engineering calculations accounted for this added waste.  Anticipated releases are estimated based on the end-of-year total waste within the waste cells.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Asbestos is disposed of on-site. Annual variation in the amounts received is normal.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of asbestos received directly affects the amount of asbestos disposed of on-site. Quantities are subject to annual variation. The quantity is for total asbestos disposed of on-site in 2020. Friable and non-friable asbestos was not differentiated.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Leachate analysis results indicated that the average ammonia concentration in the leachate was higher during the 2020 sampling events.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated particulate matter emission factors for the flare to reflect the most recent guidance in AP 42, Chapter 2.4. Was previously using the emission factor from 1997. Updated to the 2008 draft emission factor since it is more recent and has a better data quality rating.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of asbestos received directly affects the amount of asbestos disposed of on-site. Quantities are subject to annual variation. The quantity is for total asbestos disposed on-site in 2021. Friable and non-friable asbestos was not differentiated.

comments.comment: Leachate analysis results indicated the average ammonia concentration in the leachate was lower during the 2021 leachate sampling events and less leachate was treated in 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Updated Landfill Gas Model to use site specific methane content impacted the VOC calculation.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Leachate analysis results indicated the average ammonia concentration in the leachate was lower during the 2023 leachate sampling events and less leachate was produced.
